products.name: Aceto Balsamico Tradizionale di Modena DOP
pros: Authentic traditional production from selected grape varieties
Long aging process for rich flavor
Protected designation of origin ensures quality

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 guide highlights the traditional Modena DOP as the most authentic choice and the Modena IGP as the most accessible option, providing clear criteria for selecting balsamic vinegar.
videoSource: Aceto balsamico: come scegliere quello giusto
